text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Would you consider bananas to<n>be a
snack?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In addition to being packed with<n>vitamins,
minerals, and fiber, they also<n>provide glucose,
which our minds use as<n>an energy source.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I propose that they be<n>relabeled... as a
meal.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If you have any arguments, let's hear<n>them—right
here, right now. We shall<n>debate this topic until
we both reach an<n>agreement.
